title: taraxacum mirosquamatum
intro: Taraxacum mirosquamatum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum mirosquamatum include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and support liver health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in holistic and herbal medicine.
